title: nototriche rugosa
intro: Nototriche rugosa, also known as the Mexican featherbush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae, native to Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nototriche rugosa include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as aiding in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications, such as salves and creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
